mission.title: Install and Configure Inclavare Containers on Kubernetes
mission.description: Inclavare Containers is a novel container runtime designed for confidential computing, providing hardware-enforced isolation for sensitive workloads. Installing Inclavare Containers allows you to run protected containers in a Trusted Execution Environment, ensuring your data remains secure from untrusted entities.

steps.title: Install Intel SGX SDK and Driver
steps.description:
Inclavare requires Intel SGX hardware and SDK:
```bash
# Ubuntu 20.04+
echo 'deb [arch=amd64] https://download.01.org/intel-sgx/sgx_repo/ubuntu focal main' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/intel-sgx.list
wget -qO - https://download.01.org/intel-sgx/sgx_repo/ubuntu/intel-sgx-deb.key | sudo apt-key add -
sudo apt-get update
sudo apt-get install -y sgx-aesm-service libsgx-launch libsgx-urts
```

steps.title: Install the rune OCI runtime
steps.description:
Install rune, the enclave-aware OCI runtime:
```bash
curl -Lo rune https://github.com/inclavare-containers/inclavare-containers/releases/download/v0.6.2/rune-v0.6.2-linux-amd64
chmod +x rune
sudo mv rune /usr/local/bin/
```

steps.title: Configure containerd to use rune
steps.description:
Add rune as a runtime in containerd config:
```bash
sudo mkdir -p /etc/containerd
cat << 'EOF' | sudo tee -a /etc/containerd/config.toml
[plugins.cri.containerd.runtimes.rune]
  runtime_type = "io.containerd.rune.v2"
EOF
sudo systemctl restart containerd
```

resolution.summary: Inclavare Containers is installed with the rune OCI runtime for running containers in hardware-enforced TEE enclaves.

uninstall.title: Remove rune runtime
uninstall.description:
```bash
sudo rm /usr/local/bin/rune
```
Remove the rune section from `/etc/containerd/config.toml` and restart containerd.

upgrade.title: Download latest rune release
upgrade.description:
```bash
curl -Lo rune https://github.com/inclavare-containers/inclavare-containers/releases/latest/download/rune-linux-amd64
chmod +x rune
sudo mv rune /usr/local/bin/
```

troubleshooting.title: SGX not available
troubleshooting.description:
Verify your CPU supports SGX:
```bash
cpuid | grep SGX
```
SGX must be enabled in BIOS.

troubleshooting.title: AESM service not running
troubleshooting.description:
```bash
sudo systemctl status sgx_aesm
sudo systemctl start sgx_aesm
```

troubleshooting.title: Enclave creation fails
troubleshooting.description: Check enclave memory limits in `/etc/sgx_default_qcnl.conf` and ensure sufficient EPC memory is available.

prerequisites.description: Intel SGX hardware, SGX SDK, and containerd are required. Works with Kubernetes when configured as a container runtime.
